Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 86 

HIFA_WVR_1115_MOS 

LABEL: 1115 Health Insurance Flexibility and Accountability Waiver Months 

DESCRIPTION: Number of months the beneficiary was enrolled in a Section 1115 (Health Insurance Flexibility and 
Accountability [HIFA] Demonstration Initiative) waiver in the calendar year. 

SHORT NAME: HIFA_WVR_1115_MOS 

LONG NAME: HIFA_WVR_1115_MOS 

TYPE: NUM
